name: session_search
description: Full-text search across conversation history using SQLite FTS5 with per-tenant isolation. Returns BM25-ranked snippets of matching turns. User isolation is guaranteed via VELIX_USER_ID environment variable.

query.description: Full-text search query (supports FTS5 syntax: phrases in quotes, boolean operators)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10, max: 50)

mode.description: Search scope. 'session' (default)=current session histories only, 'user'=all sessions and histories for the superuser. Procs can only use 'session' mode.
